_README: REFERENCE NOTES for .claude/settings.json under the meta/envctl env model (ADR-0006) — NOT the live file, NOT a generator (it carries only _note stubs). meta/envctl owns the USER-GLOBAL home tree (envctl/home/.claude/settings.json.tmpl → $HOME/.claude/settings.json); it does NOT own or render THIS repo-local file, which is hand-maintained. Authority: the live repo file is the source of truth; this canonical snapshot tracks it (claude-settings-doctor.js is REPORT-ONLY and never edits live). 2026-06-21 de-pollution (owner-directed 'remove'): the dead USER-GLOBAL hooks that had leaked into the repo file — ruvector (not on PATH), gitnexus/ccg/global/* (~/.claude/hooks/* MISSING on host), and the omc-hud statusLine — were REMOVED. Evidence they were safe to remove: they were absent from the user-global ~/.claude/settings.json AND the envctl home template, so they were repo-only leakage, dead on this host, and removal loses nothing declared elsewhere (an upgrade/dedupe, not a downgrade). The repo file now carries ONLY functional hooks: its OWN repo-relative scripts/hooks/* plus the one installed user-global tool `rtk` (on PATH). The remaining portability concern is hardcoded absolute /home/<user>/ paths inside string VALUES — fixed via ${META_ROOT}/portable forms ($HOME/, ~/, %APPDATA%), an UPGRADE never a trim; claude-settings-doctor.js REPORTS that residue.

enabledPlugins._note: meta's Claude plugin system — legitimate, not drift. Keep.

extraKnownMarketplaces._note: meta plugin marketplaces. source.path values use ${META_ROOT} and resolve per-host; Claude Code reads source.path directly (no shell expansion), so portabilize only via a render step that emits the correct per-host path (ADR-0006), never drop.

hooks._note: Hooks shape mirror of the CLEANED live file (2026-06-21). Only FUNCTIONAL hooks are carried: the umbrella's OWN repo-relative scripts/hooks/* (actionlint-on-workflow-edit, protect-secrets-store, gitmodules-drift-guard, icm-architecture-inject on SessionStart+PreCompact) and the installed user-global `rtk` token-compactor. The previously-carried dead user-global hooks (ruvector/ccg/gitnexus/global/*) were REMOVED per owner decision — they were repo-only leakage, absent from the envctl home tree, and dead on the host. The live repo file carries NO top-level `env` block (env is home-tree-owned per ADR-0006 and rendered into $HOME, not this repo file).
